text.title: OpenAI Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `fine-tuning-openai-dpo`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: validate-pairs
step.action: Schema check; pair_count ≥500; inter-rater audit on 100 pairs.

step.name: launch-job
step.input: SFT model_id + pairs file + beta + epochs.

step.name: eval-preference-rate
step.action: Run LLM-as-judge or human-pair-vote; require preference_rate > 0.55.

step.name: deploy-or-rollback
step.action: If gated → hand to deployment methodology; else iterate beta or collect more pairs.
